mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `order` ( memberUid, orderPrice, orderDiscount, couponIssueId, orderTotal, usedPoints, shippingFee, receiver, phone, zipCode, addr1, addr2, payMethod, status, orderNote, createdAt ) VALUES ( #{memberUid}, #{orderPrice}, #{orderDiscount}, #{couponIssueId}, #{orderTotal}, #{usedPoints}, #{shippingFee}, #{receiver}, #{phone}, #{zipCode}, #{addr1}, #{addr2}, #{payMethod}, #{status}, #{orderNote}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO order_item (orderNo, prodVariantId, count, price, total) VALUES
(#{item.orderNo}, #{item.prodVariantId}, #{item.count}, #{item.price}, #{item.total})
mapper.select: SELECT orderNo, memberUid, orderPrice, orderDiscount, usedPoints, orderTotal, receiver, phone, zipCode, addr1, addr2, payMethod, createdAt FROM `order` WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}
SELECT orderItemNo, orderNo, prodVariantId, count, price, total FROM `order_item` WHERE orderNo = #{orderNo}
